messages.content:
In Spanish

"It is written, only Link can defeat Ganon."
"Está escrito, solo Link puede derrotar a Ganon."

In Spanish

"Gee, it's kind of spooky."
"Did you bring a light?"
"No!"

"Vaya, es un poco escalofriante."
"¿Trajiste una luz?"
"¡No!"

In Spanish

"Introverts of the World - Unite! Separately....In our own homes."
"Introvertidos del mundo: ¡Uníos! Por separado... en nuestras propias casas."

In Latin

"House of Black and White"

In Serb-Croatian

"THE BROADCAST WILL BEGIN SHORTLY

THANK YOU FOR YOUR PATIENCE"

"EMITOVANJE ĆE USKORO POČETI

HVALA NA STRPLJENJU"

In Spanish

"THE BROADCAST WILL BEGIN SHORTLY

THANK YOU FOR YOUR PATIENCE"

"LA TRANSMISIÓN COMENZARÁ EN BREVE

GRACIAS POR SU PACIENCIA"
